[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.description: RedSiftLoginFromNewIP_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0
Detects a successful login from an IP address that has not been seen in the previous 14 days for that user, which may indicate compromised credentials or unauthorized access.
properties.displayName: Red Sift - Login from previously unseen IP address
properties.query:
let lookback = 14d;
let recentWindow = 1h;
let historicalLogins = RedSiftAuth_CL
| extend
    ActivityName = tostring(column_ifexists("ActivityName", "")),
    UserEmail = tostring(column_ifexists("UserEmail", "")),
    SrcIp = tostring(column_ifexists("SrcIp", ""))
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(recentWindow))
| where ActivityName has "Logon"
| where isnotempty(UserEmail) and isnotempty(SrcIp)
| summarize by UserEmail, SrcIp;
RedSiftAuth_CL
| extend
    ActivityName = tostring(column_ifexists("ActivityName", "")),
    UserEmail = tostring(column_ifexists("UserEmail", "")),
    SrcIp = tostring(column_ifexists("SrcIp", "")),
    HttpUserAgent = tostring(column_ifexists("HttpUserAgent", "")),
    ServiceName = tostring(column_ifexists("ServiceName", "")),
    Severity = tostring(column_ifexists("Severity", ""))
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(recentWindow)
| where ActivityName has "Logon"
| where isnotempty(UserEmail) and isnotempty(SrcIp)
| join kind=leftanti (historicalLogins) on UserEmail, SrcIp
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UserEmail,
    SrcIp,
    HttpUserAgent,
    ServiceName,
    ActivityName,
    Severity

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: User {{UserEmail}} logged in from a previously unseen IP address {{SrcIp}}.

properties.displayName: Red Sift - Login from previously unseen IP address

properties.description: Detects email forensics events that contain one or more URLs where the sender is using a source IP address not seen in the previous 14 days, which may indicate suspicious infrastructure changes or phishing activity.
properties.displayName: Red Sift - New email with URL from previously unseen source
properties.query:
let lookback = 14d;
let recentWindow = 1h;
let historicalSources = RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
| extend
    EmailFrom = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailFrom", "")),
    SrcIp = tostring(column_ifexists("SrcIp", ""))
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(recentWindow))
| where isnotempty(EmailFrom) and isnotempty(SrcIp)
| summarize by EmailFrom, SrcIp;
RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
| extend
    EmailFrom = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailFrom", "")),
    EmailSubject = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailSubject", "")),
    EmailReturnPath = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailReturnPath", "")),
    EmailMessageUid = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailMessageUid", "")),
    SrcIp = tostring(column_ifexists("SrcIp", "")),
    DstHostname = tostring(column_ifexists("DstHostname", "")),
    Severity = tostring(column_ifexists("Severity", "")),
    Message = tostring(column_ifexists("Message", "")),
    CorrelationUid = tostring(column_ifexists("CorrelationUid", "")),
    EmailUrls = todynamic(column_ifexists("EmailUrls", "[]"))
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(recentWindow)
| where isnotempty(EmailFrom) and isnotempty(SrcIp)
| extend UrlCount = array_length(EmailUrls)
| where UrlCount > 0
| mv-apply Url = EmailUrls on (
    summarize UrlSet = make_set(tostring(Url.url_string), 50)
  )
| extend UrlList = strcat_array(UrlSet, ", ")
| join kind=leftanti (historicalSources) on EmailFrom, SrcIp
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    EmailFrom,
    EmailSubject,
    EmailReturnPath,
    EmailMessageUid,
    SrcIp,
    DstHostname,
    UrlCount,
    UrlList,
    Severity,
    Message,
    CorrelationUid

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Email from {{EmailFrom}} contains {{UrlCount}} URL(s) and originated from previously unseen source IP {{SrcIp}}.
alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: RedSift - New URL-bearing email source for {{EmailFrom}}

properties.displayName: Red Sift - New email with URL from previously unseen source

properties.description: Detects email forensics events that contain one or more URLs where the sender in the from field has not been seen in the previous 14 days, which may indicate phishing activity or a newly observed sender.
properties.displayName: Red Sift - New email with URL from previously unseen sender
properties.query:
let lookback = 14d;
let recentWindow = 1h;
let historicalSenders = RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
| extend
    EmailFrom = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailFrom", ""))
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(recentWindow))
| where isnotempty(EmailFrom)
| summarize by EmailFrom;
RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
| extend
    EmailFrom = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailFrom", "")),
    EmailSubject = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailSubject", "")),
    EmailReturnPath = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailReturnPath", "")),
    EmailMessageUid = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailMessageUid", "")),
    SrcIp = tostring(column_ifexists("SrcIp", "")),
    DstHostname = tostring(column_ifexists("DstHostname", "")),
    Severity = tostring(column_ifexists("Severity", "")),
    Message = tostring(column_ifexists("Message", "")),
    CorrelationUid = tostring(column_ifexists("CorrelationUid", "")),
    EmailUrls = todynamic(column_ifexists("EmailUrls", "[]"))
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(recentWindow)
| where isnotempty(EmailFrom)
| extend UrlCount = array_length(EmailUrls)
| where UrlCount > 0
| mv-apply Url = EmailUrls on (
    summarize UrlSet = make_set(tostring(Url.url_string), 50)
  )
| extend UrlList = strcat_array(UrlSet, ", ")
| join kind=leftanti (historicalSenders) on EmailFrom
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    EmailFrom,
    EmailSubject,
    EmailReturnPath,
    EmailMessageUid,
    SrcIp,
    DstHostname,
    UrlCount,
    UrlList,
    Severity,
    Message,
    CorrelationUid

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Email from previously unseen sender {{EmailFrom}} contains {{UrlCount}} URL(s).

properties.displayName: Red Sift - New email with URL from previously unseen sender

properties.description: RedSiftMFADisabled_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

This query searches for authentication events where MFA has been disabled on an account, which may indicate account takeover activity, weakened account protections, or unauthorized administrative changes.
properties.displayName: Red Sift - MFA disabled on account
properties.query:
RedSiftAuth_CL
| extend
    ActivityName = tostring(column_ifexists("ActivityName", "")),
    UserEmail = tostring(column_ifexists("UserEmail", "")),
    ActorUserEmail = tostring(column_ifexists("ActorUserEmail", "")),
    SrcIp = tostring(column_ifexists("SrcIp", "")),
    HttpUserAgent = tostring(column_ifexists("HttpUserAgent", "")),
    ServiceName = tostring(column_ifexists("ServiceName", "")),
    Severity = tostring(column_ifexists("Severity", "")),
    UserUid = tostring(column_ifexists("UserUid", "")),
    ActorUserUid = tostring(column_ifexists("ActorUserUid", ""))
| where ActivityName =~ "MFA Disabled"
| where isnotempty(UserEmail) or isnotempty(ActorUserEmail)
| extend TargetAccount = iff(isnotempty(UserEmail), UserEmail, ActorUserEmail)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    TargetAccount,
    UserEmail,
    ActorUserEmail,
    SrcIp,
    HttpUserAgent,
    ServiceName,
    ActivityName,
    Severity,
    UserUid,
    ActorUserUid

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: MFA was disabled for {{TargetAccount}}. Actor: {{ActorUserEmail}}. Source IP: {{SrcIp}}.

properties.displayName: Red Sift - MFA disabled on account

properties.description: Detects email forensics events containing one or more URLs whose domain has not been seen in the previous 14 days, which may indicate newly observed phishing infrastructure or suspicious delivery patterns.
properties.displayName: Red Sift - Email with URL to previously unseen domain
properties.query:
let lookback = 14d;
let recentWindow = 1h;
let historicalDomains = RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
| extend EmailUrls = todynamic(EmailUrls)
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(recentWindow))
| where isnotempty(EmailUrls) and array_length(EmailUrls) > 0
| mv-expand Url = EmailUrls
| extend UrlString = tostring(Url.url_string)
| where isnotempty(UrlString)
| extend UrlDomain = tostring(parse_url(UrlString).Host)
| where isnotempty(UrlDomain)
| summarize by UrlDomain;
RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
| extend
    EmailFrom = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailFrom", "")),
    EmailSubject = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailSubject", "")),
    EmailReturnPath = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailReturnPath", "")),
    EmailMessageUid = tostring(column_ifexists("EmailMessageUid", "")),
    SrcIp = tostring(column_ifexists("SrcIp", "")),
    DstHostname = tostring(column_ifexists("DstHostname", "")),
    Severity = tostring(column_ifexists("Severity", "")),
    Message = tostring(column_ifexists("Message", "")),
    CorrelationUid = tostring(column_ifexists("CorrelationUid", "")),
    EmailUrls = todynamic(EmailUrls)
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(recentWindow)
| where isnotempty(EmailUrls) and array_length(EmailUrls) > 0
| mv-expand Url = EmailUrls
| extend UrlString = tostring(Url.url_string)
| where isnotempty(UrlString)
| extend UrlDomain = tostring(parse_url(UrlString).Host)
| where isnotempty(UrlDomain)
| join kind=leftanti (historicalDomains) on UrlDomain
| summarize
    NewUrlDomains = make_set(UrlDomain, 50),
    NewUrls = make_set(UrlString, 50),
    NewDomainCount = dcount(UrlDomain),
    UrlCount = dcount(UrlString),
    RepresentativeUrlDomain = take_any(UrlDomain)
    by TimeGenerated,
    EmailFrom,
    EmailSubject,
    EmailReturnPath,
    EmailMessageUid,
    SrcIp,
    DstHostname,
    Severity,
    Message,
    CorrelationUid
| extend
    NewUrlDomainList = strcat_array(NewUrlDomains, ", "),
    NewUrlList = strcat_array(NewUrls, ", ")
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    EmailFrom,
    EmailSubject,
    EmailReturnPath,
    EmailMessageUid,
    SrcIp,
    DstHostname,
    RepresentativeUrlDomain,
    NewDomainCount,
    UrlCount,
    NewUrlDomainList,
    NewUrlList,
    Severity,
    Message,
    CorrelationUid

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Email from {{EmailFrom}} contains {{NewDomainCount}} previously unseen URL domain(s): {{NewUrlDomainList}}.
alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: RedSift - URL to new domain in email from {{EmailFrom}}

properties.displayName: Red Sift - Email with URL to previously unseen domain

connectorUiConfig.title: Red Sift Events (CCP Push)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Red Sift](https://redsift.com/) connector provides the capability to ingest Red Sift authentication and email forensics events into Microsoft Sentinel using the CCP push model with DCE + DCR.

sampleQueries.query:
RedSiftAuth_CL
 | summarize count() by UserUid, UserEmail

RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
 | summarize count() by DkimResult, SpfResult

dataTypes.name: RedSiftAuth_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
RedSiftAuth_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

value:
RedSiftAuth_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(7d)

RedSiftEmailForensics_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(7d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra
customs.description: Permission to create an app registration in Microsoft Entra ID. Typically requires Entra ID Application Developer role or higher.

customs.name: Microsoft Azure
customs.description: Permission to assign Monitoring Metrics Publisher role on data collection rule (DCR). Typically requires Azure RBAC Owner or User Access Administrator role.

instructionSteps.title: 1. Create ARM Resources and Provide the Required Permissions
instructionSteps.description: Deploy the DCE, DCR, custom table, and the Entra app registration used for OAuth client credentials.

parameters.content:
#### Automated Configuration and Secure Data Ingestion with Entra Application
Clicking on "Deploy" will trigger the creation of Log Analytics tables and a Data Collection Rule (DCR). It will then create an Entra application, link the DCR to it, and set the entered secret in the application. This setup enables data to be sent securely to the DCR using an Entra token.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure Red Sift webhook
instructionSteps.description: Use the following parameters to configure Red Sift to send events to Microsoft Sentinel. Use the appropriate stream name for each event type.

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Application ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the App Registration Application ID

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Secret
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the App Registration Secret

parameters.label: Data Collection Endpoint Uri
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the Data Collection Endpoint Uri

parameters.label: Data Collection Rule Immutable ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the Data Collection Rule Immutable ID

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(event['timestamp']) | extend EventTime = todatetime(event['details']['time']) | extend Id = tostring(event['details']['id']) | extend ActivityId = toint(event['details']['activity_id']) | extend ActivityName = tostring(event['details']['activity_name']) | extend ActorUserUid = tostring(event['details']['actor']['user']['uid']) | extend ActorUserEmail = tostring(event['details']['actor']['user']['email_addr']) | extend CategoryUid = toint(event['details']['category_uid']) | extend CategoryName = tostring(event['details']['category_name']) | extend ClassUid = toint(event['details']['class_uid']) | extend ClassName = tostring(event['details']['class_name']) | extend TypeUid = toint(event['details']['type_uid']) | extend SeverityId = toint(event['details']['severity_id']) | extend Severity = tostring(event['details']['severity']) | extend SrcIp = tostring(event['details']['src_endpoint']['ip']) | extend HttpUserAgent = tostring(event['details']['http_request']['user_agent']) | extend UserUid = tostring(event['details']['user']['uid']) | extend UserEmail = tostring(event['details']['user']['email_addr']) | extend ServiceName = tostring(event['details']['service']['name']) | project TimeGenerated, EventTime, Id, ActivityId, ActivityName, ActorUserUid, ActorUserEmail, CategoryUid, CategoryName, ClassUid, ClassName, TypeUid, SeverityId, Severity, SrcIp, HttpUserAgent, UserUid, UserEmail, ServiceName

source | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(event['timestamp']) | extend EventTime = datetime(1970-01-01) + tolong(event['details']['time']) * 1ms | extend ActivityId = toint(event['details']['activity_id']) | extend ActivityName = tostring(event['details']['activity_name']) | extend CategoryUid = toint(event['details']['category_uid']) | extend CategoryName = tostring(event['details']['category_name']) | extend ClassUid = toint(event['details']['class_uid']) | extend ClassName = tostring(event['details']['class_name']) | extend TypeUid = toint(event['details']['type_uid']) | extend SeverityId = toint(event['details']['severity_id']) | extend Severity = tostring(event['details']['severity']) | extend Direction = tostring(event['details']['direction']) | extend Message = tostring(event['details']['message']) | extend ProtocolName = tostring(event['details']['protocol_name']) | extend EmailFrom = tostring(event['details']['email']['from']) | extend EmailSubject = tostring(event['details']['email']['subject']) | extend EmailReturnPath = tostring(event['details']['email']['return_path']) | extend EmailMessageUid = tostring(event['details']['email']['message_uid']) | extend EmailUrls = todynamic(event['details']['email']['urls']) | extend DkimResult = tostring(event['details']['email_auth']['dkim']) | extend SpfResult = tostring(event['details']['email_auth']['spf']) | extend SrcIp = tostring(event['details']['src_endpoint']['ip']) | extend DstHostname = tostring(event['details']['dst_endpoint']['hostname']) | extend Enrichments = todynamic(event['details']['enrichments']) | extend Observables = todynamic(event['details']['observables']) | extend CorrelationUid = tostring(event['details']['metadata']['correlation_uid']) | extend ProductName = tostring(event['details']['metadata']['product']['name']) | extend LogName = tostring(event['details']['metadata']['log_name']) | project TimeGenerated, EventTime, ActivityId, ActivityName, CategoryUid, CategoryName, ClassUid, ClassName, TypeUid, SeverityId, Severity, Direction, Message, ProtocolName, EmailFrom, EmailSubject, EmailReturnPath, EmailMessageUid, EmailUrls, DkimResult, SpfResult, SrcIp, DstHostname, Enrichments, Observables, CorrelationUid, ProductName, LogName

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Red Sift solution for Microsoft Sentinel provides the capability to ingest authentication events from Red Sift Pulse and email forensics events from OnDMARC into your Microsoft Sentinel workspace using the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) Push pattern.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional ingestion or operational costs:

  1. Microsoft Sentinel

  2. Azure Monitor

  3. Codeless Connector Framework

Data Connectors: 1, Analytic Rules: 5

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
